name: prism
display_name: Prism — Multichain Wallet for AI Agents
description: A self-custodial multichain wallet for Claude. Check balances and settle x402 payments across EVM, Solana, Algorand, Stellar, and Bitcoin Lightning — keys stay encrypted on your machine.
long_description: Prism gives Claude a self-custodial multichain wallet. Tools include list_chains, get_balances, get_portfolio, send, pay, x402_fetch, swap-ready transfers, allowance management, and discover_services (the verified Prism Index registry). Keys are stored in an encrypted keystore under ~/.prism and never leave your machine. A spending policy (per-call and per-day caps, allow/deny lists, autonomy modes) protects your funds, and a durable ledger keeps budgets across restarts.

seed_phrase.title: Recovery Phrase (seed)
seed_phrase.description: BIP-39 recovery phrase used to derive keys for every chain. Stored in your OS keychain.

evm_private_key.title: EVM Private Key (optional)
evm_private_key.description: 0x-prefixed key for EVM chains. Overrides the seed for EVM.

solana_secret_key.title: Solana Secret Key (optional)
solana_secret_key.description: Base58 secret key for Solana. Overrides the seed for Solana.

network.title: Default Network
network.description: Default chain, e.g. base, base-sepolia, arbitrum, optimism, polygon.

max_per_day.title: Max per Day (USD)
max_per_day.description: Maximum total allowed per calendar day.

index_url.title: Prism Index URL (optional)
index_url.description: Base URL of a Prism Index registry for service discovery.

tools.name: list_chains
tools.description: List supported chains, capabilities, and addresses.

tools.name: get_balances
tools.description: Native and token balances for a chain.

tools.name: send
tools.description: Send native gas or tokens to an address or name.

tools.name: pay
tools.description: Sign an x402 payment authorization header.

tools.name: discover_services
tools.description: Search the verified Prism Index registry.
